meaning: n.(兴趣活动等的)中心,焦点,焦距,[医]病灶,[地](地震的)震源vi.聚焦,注视vt.使集中在焦点上,定焦点,调焦,集中
examples: He prefers to focus on the positive.
Now the focus is on draining the water.
His comments provided a focus for debate.
This time, he was going to focus on losing weight by restricting his diet first.
Today the focus is on the future of Trident which probably Washington is less interested in.
